errors.defaultAction: Unable to complete the action. Please try again later.
errors.network: Network problem. Check your connection and try again.
errors.cooldown: This action is on cooldown. Please try again shortly.
errors.cooldownSeconds: Too early to repeat this action. Wait {seconds} seconds.

email.title: Email
email.subtitle: SMTP settings for password recovery emails and system notifications.

form.title: Resend SMTP
form.helper: Enable delivery so password reset emails are sent through backend SMTP. An empty API key field keeps the saved key unchanged.

provider.title: Email provider
provider.helper: Choose Resend SMTP to fill host, port, username, TLS and SSL automatically.

fields.frontendBaseUrl: Frontend base URL for reset links

hints.fromEmail: Domain svom.com.ua must be verified in Resend.
hints.hostPassword: Paste the Resend API key. It is used as the SMTP password.

test.title: Test delivery
test.helper: Save the settings first, then send a test email to a real address.
